details.productUrlName: Colonel John Jameson Huntmaster of the Fells Borderless

customAttributes.description:
Whenever this creature enters or transforms into Colonel John Jameson, create a 2/2 green Wolf creature token and you gain 2 life.
At the beginning of each upkeep, if no spells were cast last turn, transform this creature.
//
Man-Wolf
Trample
Whenever this creature transforms into Man-Wolf, it deals 2 damage to target opponent or planeswalker and 2 damage to up to one target creature that player or that planeswalker's controller controls.
At the beginning of each upkeep, if a player cast two or more spells last turn, transform this creature.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 09/26/2025. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
